title: Montrosa Ocean
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Tie_Montrosa.jpg|thumb|300px]]
The '''Montrosa Ocean''' was a large body of water that contained the [[Montrosa Islands]] on the agricultural [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]].

The [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] was so large, it influenced much of the Reytha's climate. It was said to hold a relatively pleasant temperature.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
